--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

FYI

Feb 27 mtg of John Amerling with Jamie and Bill
intended to get John up to
speed with status of all permit activity. I will
try to schedule time to be
in St. Thomas for that meeting.

Darren

Subject: Fw: GSJ permits

Subject: Re: GSJ permits

Bill, I still need to go back to DPNR to fill in
some blanks but I will have the info for you this
week. --Dave

Jamie:

What is the meeting about?

I can attend. I have a dentist appointment at
2:15 and should be out in time for the meeting. I
will bring what info that I have.

Bill
----- Original Message -----
From: Jamey Casner
To: 'William McComb' ; 'Darren Indyke' ; 'James
Casner'
Sent: Tuesday, February 21, 2006 11:16 AM
Subject: RE: GSJ permits

I just spoke with John Amerling of RR Caribbean

Contractors. He is meeting with me at 4:00 Monday
the 27th. I need copies of ALL Permits in place and
ALL Applications for pending permits in hand for
that discussion. Bill - Can you be here for this
meeting with the necessary stuff? Please advise.
ajc
-----Original Message-----
From: William McComb
[mailto:wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net]
Sent: Thursday, February 16, 2006 3:31 PM
To: Darren Indyke; James Casner
Subject: Fw: GSJ permits

  FYI


  Bill


  ----- Original Message ----- 
  From: david grigg 
  To: wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net 
  Sent: Thursday, February 16, 2006 2:22 PM
  Subject: GSJ permits


  I went thru all the permit log books and I

have a list of the permits. However, there are some
gaps and missing info which I need to fill in by
talking with staff. They kicked me out so they
could go to lunch. I'll try to finish tomorrow. I
also got all the available info on LSJ.
